autoenchant.tooltip.item: Click here, then click an enchantable item in your inventory
autoenchant.tooltip.item_selected: %s selected — click to choose another item
autoenchant.tooltip.enchant: Enchant every matching item as quickly as the server allows
autoenchant.tooltip.auto: Automatically start when you open an enchantment table
autoenchant.warning.lapis: ⚠ Not enough lapis for all %3$s items
autoenchant.status.no_enchantable: No enchantable items are in your inventory.
autoenchant.status.pick_item: ✦ Click an enchantable inventory item • right-click to cancel
autoenchant.status.pick_nonempty: Pick a slot containing an item.
autoenchant.status.pick_enchantable: That item cannot use an enchantment table.
autoenchant.status.input_occupied: Remove the different item from the table first.
autoenchant.status.input_already_enchant: Remove the already enchanted item from the table first.
autoenchant.status.no_offer: Offer %s is unavailable for this item/table.
autoenchant.status.no_lapis: Not enough lapis (need %s for the next item).
autoenchant.status.no_xp: Not enough XP levels (next offer requires level %s).
autoenchant.status.offer_rejected: The server rejected this enchantment offer.
autoenchant.status.server_timeout: The server did not answer the enchant request.
autoenchant.status.complete: Done — every matching item is enchanted!
autoenchant.configuration.title: AutoEnchant Settings
